title: achyranthes mutica
intro: Achyranthes mutica, also known as Xian Ling Pi, is a plant species that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Achyranthes mutica include reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as improving kidney function and treating certain types of arthritis. Achyranthes mutica is often prepared as a decoction or a powder, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
